crime.value: Murder by stabbing on a train - Ratchett killed in his compartment despite being guarded
crime.quote: I did travel by the same train, and in spite of me, somebody did get him.

victim.value: Ratchett - a man who had received threatening letters and was involved in child kidnappings including Daisy's death
victim.quote: he was responsible for my daughter's death and her child's and that of the other child

closed_world.value: The Orient Express train - a confined space where passengers are trapped together during the journey
closed_world.quote: The only way a thug could come was through the rear-end door to the platform, or along the train from the rear

culprit_and_motive.value: Multiple passengers acting together in revenge for Ratchett's role in child kidnappings and deaths
culprit_and_motive.quote: Society had condemned him - we were only carrying out the sentence.

resolution.value: Poirot solves the case and offers two theories, with authorities choosing to accept the simpler explanation
resolution.quote: having placed my solution before you, I have the honour to retire from the case.

investigator.value: Hercule Poirot - the famous Belgian detective who investigates the murder on the train
investigator.quote: To which the stranger (by name M. Hercule Poirot) had made a fitting reply

suspect_architecture.value: Multiple passengers on Orient Express, each with connection to kidnapped Daisy - including family, servants, and associates seeking justice against Ratchett
suspect_architecture.quote: All these good faithful souls - and poor Michel - and Mary and Colonel Arbuthnot - they love each other...

red_herring.value: Description of small, dark man with womanish voice as potential assassin to misdirect from multiple conspirators
red_herring.quote: A small man - dark - with a womanish kind of voice. That's what the old man said.

clue_fairness.value: Physical evidence and testimonies presented to reader alongside Poirot's investigation, including compartment positions and timeline
clue_fairness.quote: The only way a thug could come was through the rear-end door to the platform, or along the train from the rear

social_world.value: French military hierarchy and railway company authority structure, with General's power and railway director's influence over investigation
social_world.quote: You have saved the honour of the French Army - you have averted much bloodshed!

alibi.value: Detective Hardman's strategic positioning in berth No. 16 creates supposed surveillance that fails, questioning his alibi and competence
alibi.quote: it seemed to me that No. 16 was a pretty good strategic position

reveal_mechanic.value: Poirot presents alternative theory to railway officials who choose to accept false solution over truth to avoid scandal
reveal_mechanic.quote: the first theory you put forward was the correct one - decidedly so

media_and_audience.value: Railway company and authorities conspire to present false narrative to Jugo-Slavian police to protect institutional interests
media_and_audience.quote: I suggest that that is the solution we offer to the Jugo-Slavian police when they arrive

investigator_wound.value: Poirot faces moral dilemma between legal justice and natural justice, questioning his role when victims seek righteous vengeance
investigator_wound.quote: Society had condemned him - we were only carrying out the sentence.

_meta.title: ebook agatha christie murder on the orient express
